title: Gomorrha #1116
definition:
Gomorrha = "submersion"

 1) a city in eastern part of Judah that was destroyed when the Lord
    rained fire and brimstone on it; now covered by the Dead Sea

 1) a city in eastern part of Judah that was destroyed when the Lord
    rained fire and brimstone on it; now covered by the Dead Sea
